status: operational bridge normalization, not identity proof

ancient_yi_model.state: tuple d=(d0,...,d{k-1}) with digits 0..7 displayed least-significant-place first
ancient_yi_model.internal_successor: increment d0; propagate carry to higher d_i on overflow
ancient_yi_model.completion: all d_i=7 at fixed length k, value=8^k-1
ancient_yi_model.lift: reset existing k digits to 0 and append high digit 1: 77->001, 777->0001
ancient_yi_model.classification: strong L/carry and readout bridge; B-like refinement candidate remains open

corrected_orthad_model.L: q and theta carry; rank grows by one; axis latches and new active axis opens
corrected_orthad_model.readout: Orthad reads after emitted walk exists; Shadow external

objective_missing_pieces: Full Ancient Yi line-symbol-to-digit convention for all table rows
Evidence whether Yi successor is only enumeration or also situation-change rule grammar
External B-like refinement governed by position/capacity, not only base-8 successor
